bloodlines.name: Apollinaire
bloodlines.description: Gatekeepers who act as mediums and invokers of spirits.
bloodlines.weakness: The Curse of Ghede (depth perception penalty, possession resistance capped by Humanity)

bloodlines.name: Deucalion
bloodlines.description: Mentors who seek to help Kindred attain perfection and overcome their banes.
bloodlines.weakness: The Myopic Curse (Social penalty when lacking Touchstones)

bloodlines.name: Dragolescu
bloodlines.description: The Possessed who siphon deathly energy from ghosts.
bloodlines.weakness: The Beacon Curse (Resistance against ghosts and deathly beings is capped by Humanity)

bloodlines.name: Gorgons
bloodlines.description: Medusas with an affinity for snakes and reptilian transformations.
bloodlines.weakness: The Curse of Minerva (Gains noticeable snake features as Humanity falls below 7)

bloodlines.name: Icarians
bloodlines.description: Dynasts driven by overwhelming ambition and willpower.
bloodlines.weakness: The All or Nothing Curse (Limited Willpower regain when defending Anchors after breaking points)

bloodlines.name: Macellarius
bloodlines.description: Gluttons tempted to consume flesh and massive amounts of Vitae.
bloodlines.weakness: The Epicurean Curse (Penalty to resist frenzy unless heavily fed)

bloodlines.name: Nahualli
bloodlines.description: Jekylls trying to suppress the beast through bloody rituals.
bloodlines.weakness: The Tempting Curse (Persistent Tempted condition and penalty to frenzy resistance)

bloodlines.name: Sotoha
bloodlines.description: Outsiders masking their emotions entirely to remain aloof.
bloodlines.weakness: The Callous Curse (Touchstones attach at higher Humanity; unattached Touchstones cannot stop frenzy)

bloodlines.name: Vardyvle
bloodlines.description: Doppelgängers who yearn for what they are not and lose themselves in others' lives.
bloodlines.weakness: The Covetous Curse (False Memories from envied victims)

bloodlines.name: Agonistes
bloodlines.description: Polemicists attempting to master torpor and memory.
bloodlines.weakness: The Languorous Curse (Addicted to torpor; involuntary torpor decreases Humanity)

bloodlines.name: Alucinor
bloodlines.description: Sandmen who study and manipulate dreams.
bloodlines.weakness: The Dreamstruck Curse (Trouble distinguishing waking from sleep; subject to delusions during breaking points)

bloodlines.name: Ankou
bloodlines.description: Guardians and reapers enforcing the ecosystem of the dead.
bloodlines.weakness: The Distanced Curse (Must roll Humanity to regain Willpower from maintaining their Mask)

bloodlines.name: Connected
bloodlines.description: Oracles who manipulate technology and digital systems.
bloodlines.weakness: The Anonymous Curse (Distracted Condition when in large crowds)

bloodlines.name: Család
bloodlines.description: Stone Sires tied mystically to the cities they claim.
bloodlines.weakness: The Civic Curse (Lethargic Condition when resting outside their territory)

bloodlines.name: Icelus
bloodlines.description: Manipulators disguised as hypnotherapists plumbing the collective unconscious.
bloodlines.weakness: The Hypnotic Curse (Detachment inflicts a Mesmerized state)

bloodlines.name: Kuufukuji
bloodlines.description: Celibates starving the Beast through martial asceticism.
bloodlines.weakness: The Ascetic Curse (Gains the Bestial Condition if drinking Vitae in excess of Humanity dots)

bloodlines.name: Leandros
bloodlines.description: Heartbreakers searching desperately for soulmates.
bloodlines.weakness: The Infatuated Curse (Obsession with mortal vessels upon feeding; subsequent Vitae tastes like water)

bloodlines.name: Libitinarius
bloodlines.description: Morticians curating torpor for other Kindred.
bloodlines.weakness: The Petrified Curse (Daytime actions suffer severe penalties; no 10-again during the day)

bloodlines.name: Lynx
bloodlines.description: Operators managing vast social and digital networks.
bloodlines.weakness: The Disconnected Curse (Needs at least two attached Touchstones to gain detachment bonuses)

bloodlines.name: Mnemosyne
bloodlines.description: Keepers who steal and trade memories.
bloodlines.weakness: The Gestalt Curse (False Memories Condition when feeding from previous victims)

bloodlines.name: Norvegi
bloodlines.description: Knives and outlaws with mutable, twisting flesh.
bloodlines.weakness: The Curse of Glamr (Physical mutations cause social penalties unless controlled)

bloodlines.name: Qedeshah
bloodlines.description: Mothers cultivating mystical families of mortals and ghouls.
bloodlines.weakness: The Fretful Curse (Guilty Condition if they do not defend Touchstones or anointed)

bloodlines.name: Sangiovanni
bloodlines.description: Necromancers studying death with a clinical appraisal.
bloodlines.weakness: The Uncanny Curse (Humanity treated as lower for social rolls due to obsession with dead bodies)

bloodlines.name: Tismanu
bloodlines.description: Shepherds acting as confessors for other vampires.
bloodlines.weakness: The Martyr Curse (Humanity drop if denying a sincere request for help)

bloodlines.name: Asnâm
bloodlines.description: Idols demanding worship and cultivating cults.
bloodlines.weakness: The Vainglorious Curse (Daeva bane is triggered by exceptional success in Social actions)

bloodlines.name: The Carnival
bloodlines.description: Freaks turning their Requiems into a twisted circus.
bloodlines.weakness: The Transient Curse (Social penalties when staying in a community too long)

bloodlines.name: Jharana
bloodlines.description: Menders receiving the dead signal from the God-Machine.
bloodlines.weakness: The Omen Curse (Obsession Condition if feeding from the same person multiple times)

bloodlines.name: Kallisti
bloodlines.description: Ravagers sowing discord and breaking bonds of love.
bloodlines.weakness: The Loveless Curse (Cannot inflict stage 3 Vinculum; thralls easily break bonds)

bloodlines.name: Lidérc
bloodlines.description: The Beloved sapping the emotional will of their lovers.
bloodlines.weakness: The Devoted Curse (Touchstones fade when taking the Dependent Condition)

bloodlines.name: Septemi
bloodlines.description: The Passionate driven by human virtues.
bloodlines.weakness: The Upright Curse (Lose Willpower when resisting opportunities to fulfill their mortal Virtue)

bloodlines.name: Spina
bloodlines.description: Knights enforcing politesse with extreme prejudice.
bloodlines.weakness: The Politesse Curse (Must punish unapologetic rudeness before the end of the scene)

bloodlines.name: Tianpàn Xiao
bloodlines.description: Sirens overwhelmed by their own sensual emotions.
bloodlines.weakness: The Sensualist Curse (Humanity treated as lower when suffering Bestial, Wanton, or Competitive)

bloodlines.name: Vilseduire
bloodlines.description: Tempters bringing out the absolute worst in mortals and Kindred.
bloodlines.weakness: The Ablative Curse (Breaking points occur at half normal Humanity)

bloodlines.name: Zelani
bloodlines.description: Devils manipulating fate and bound by thresholds.
bloodlines.weakness: The Threshold Curse (Must roll Humanity to enter mortal homes uninvited, or face frenzy)

bloodlines.name: Amari
bloodlines.description: Winter Kings surviving the polar night.
bloodlines.weakness: The Pale Curse (Severe penalty to resist frenzy from fire and sunlight)

bloodlines.name: Annunaku
bloodlines.description: Landlords ruling their domains as feudal lords.
bloodlines.weakness: The Feudal Curse (Touchstone is tied to their household/territory)

bloodlines.name: Bohagande
bloodlines.description: Jonahs manipulating fate and bad luck.
bloodlines.weakness: The Raven's Curse (Exceptional successes on Physical/Social actions can backfire with a dice penalty)

bloodlines.name: Nepheshim
bloodlines.description: Mendicants wandering the earth in holy poverty.
bloodlines.weakness: The Itinerant Curse (Frenzying in a territory requires Willpower to wake thereafter)

bloodlines.name: Nosoi
bloodlines.description: Plague Doctors cultivating diseases in their blood.
bloodlines.weakness: The Calamitous Curse (Addicted to a specific blood-borne illness; limits uninfected sustenance)

bloodlines.name: Vedma
bloodlines.description: Warlocks passing off Kindred powers as witchcraft.
bloodlines.weakness: The Bewitched Curse (Limbs wither, taking Arm/Leg Wrack Tilts over time)

bloodlines.name: Azerkatil
bloodlines.description: Dragonslayers hunting their fellow Kindred.
bloodlines.weakness: The Kin-Slayer's Curse (Increased difficulty relating to non-Azerkatil vampires)

bloodlines.name: Baddacelli
bloodlines.description: Morlocks living completely blind in darkness.
bloodlines.weakness: The Chiropteran Curse (Persistent Blind Condition)

bloodlines.name: Burakumin
bloodlines.description: The Unclean rotting with necrotic energy.
bloodlines.weakness: The Putrescent Curse (Humanity reduced for social rolls due to rotting appearance)

bloodlines.name: Galloi
bloodlines.description: Pretties obsessed with beauty and blood bathing.
bloodlines.weakness: The Popular Curse (Mortal subjects of failed social actions gain Obsession Condition)

bloodlines.name: Morotrophians
bloodlines.description: Monks tied to bureaucratic institutions.
bloodlines.weakness: The Cloistered Curse (Confused Condition if a dramatic failure happens outside an institution)

bloodlines.name: Dunia
bloodlines.description: Surveyors searching for the lost city of Irem.
bloodlines.weakness: The Curse of Ubar (Persistent Aspiration to search for Irem)

bloodlines.name: Rexroth
bloodlines.description: Diviners with too much compassion for the dead.
bloodlines.weakness: The Fleeting Curse (Clan bane extends to ghosts and Sin-Eaters)

bloodlines.name: Stawa
bloodlines.description: Ronin compromised by their blood ties.
bloodlines.weakness: The Friendless Curse (Humanity treated lower for bane when in a coterie of Ahranites)

bloodlines.name: Mortifiers of the Flesh
bloodlines.description: Flagellants who suffer for their sins in service to the Lancea Sanctum.
bloodlines.weakness: The Penitent Curse (Must flagellate if taking more than Humanity in Vitae, or suffer Guilty Condition)

bloodlines.name: Parliamentarians
bloodlines.description: Hidebound bureaucrats obsessed with order.
bloodlines.weakness: The Ordered Curse (Detachment from passion for procedures)

bloodlines.name: Penumbrae
bloodlines.description: Seers delving into dreams with Crúac.
bloodlines.weakness: The Somnolent Curse (Difficult to wake from torpor)

bloodlines.name: Scions of the First City
bloodlines.description: Harbingers bound to their home city.
bloodlines.weakness: The Mother's Curse (Agitated outside city bounds, limiting dice pools)

bloodlines.name: Stalkers
bloodlines.description: The Twice-Cursed who bear the burden of two clan curses.
bloodlines.weakness: The Miserable Curse (Gains Daeva and Nosferatu banes at Humanity 6)

bloodlines.name: Therion
bloodlines.description: Advocates for Belial's Brood and the Beast.
bloodlines.weakness: The Gnostic Curse (Embrace costs two Humanity dots)

bloodlines.name: Bekaak
bloodlines.description: Prophets who can reverse their aging process.
bloodlines.weakness: Geriatric Condition as their mental faculties degrade with age

bloodlines.name: Hypatian
bloodlines.description: Miracle cure peddlers using alchemical blood.
bloodlines.weakness: Treats Humanity as one dot lower for their clan bane

bloodlines.name: Julii
bloodlines.description: Founders of the Camarilla, now a dead clan.
bloodlines.weakness: The Strigid Curse (Vulnerable to otherworldly influence, capped by Humanity)

bloodlines.name: Nhang
bloodlines.description: Water Serpents who inhabit watery prisons.
bloodlines.weakness: The Curse of the Depths (Skin becomes brittle and fragile outside water, taking upgraded damage)

bloodlines.name: Pijavica
bloodlines.description: Leeches who exist in a balance between human and blood form.
bloodlines.weakness: Turbulent reproduction and blood form reliance
